app.name: WAV to MP3 Converter
app.description: A client-side web app that converts WAV files to MP3 directly in the browser using lamejs. No files are uploaded to a server.

features: In-browser conversion with no server upload
Per-file conversion status and MP3 download links

privacy.file_handling: All audio files remain on-device and are processed locally in-browser.

review_checklist.notes: Generated draft; confirm final contact and production URL before submission.
